name: Tortellini Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 oz tortellini, meat or cheese filled
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage.
2. Season with basil and oregano.
3. Drain grease and pat with paper towel.
4. Saute onion and garlic in broth, water, and other liquids until heated through.
5. Skim off any fat from the liquid.
6. Add carrots and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Add tortellini last, along with green pepper and zucchini.
8. Simmer for an additional 30-40 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
